title: SDD state
description: Per-repository active SDD task state (.sdd/state.json). Read by the PreToolUse hook and CI to verify the workflow.

phase.description: Current SDD phase. The hook allows source edits only at implement/verify (or Tier 0).

spec.description: Path to the active spec directory, e.g. specs/<feature>/.

note.description: Optional. Justification for a Tier 0/1 exemption (audit trail).
